description: Episodic memory log storing user decision events for agent learning. 90-day retention.

columns.description: Primary column — short summary of the decision event.
The type of user decision event recorded.
Reference identifier for the related entity — card ID or sender email.
Free-text description of the event providing additional context.
Email address of the sender involved in this event. Nullable — not all events have a sender.
Timestamp when the decision event occurred.
The trigger type of the card associated with this event.
Delegation target or override reason. Nullable — only populated for DELEGATED or TRIAGE_OVERRIDDEN events.

notes.design_rationale: Append-only event log. Each row captures a single user decision. Rows are never updated after creation — the table is designed for time-series analysis and pattern detection by the semantic knowledge promotion logic.
notes.retention: 90-day retention policy. A scheduled Power Automate flow deletes rows older than 90 days to keep the table performant. The semantic knowledge promotion flow runs before the retention cleanup.
notes.security: Table uses UserOwned ownership type. Row-level security is enforced via an ownership-based security role so each user's decision history is private.
notes.system_columns: Standard Dataverse system columns (ownerid, createdon, modifiedon, statecode, statuscode) are created automatically and do not need to be defined here.
